Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Depositions Of Jodie Bente And Fernando Soriano And For Monetary Sanctions Against
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT IMR CONTRACTOR CORPORATION'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITIONS OF JODIE BENTE AND FERNANDO SORIANO AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST JODIE BENTE, FERNANDO SORIANO, AND ATTORNEY DAVID BARRETT JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY.

APPEARANCES: David S. Barrett, Esq. of Law Office of David S. Barrett 916/440-0233 for pltf & opposing party (appearing via CourtCall); Frederick J. Northrop, Esq. of Last & Faoro 650/696-8350 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - Denied. Defendant fails to demonstrate a reasonable and good faith effort to meet and confer. Defendant must pay plaintiff $1,000 as mandatory sanctions. (C.C.P. section 2023.020). Plaintiff to prepare a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported
